languages.text: "Деяние истинного слуги Бога-Императора — без сомнений и страха обрушиться на врага Человечества".

traits.locale_text: "Деяние истинного слуги Бога-Императора — без сомнений и страха обрушиться на врага Человечества".
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "The actions of a true servant of the God-Emperor — to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt or fear."
languages.original_text: "Деяние истинного слуги Бога-Императора — без сомнений и страха обрушиться на врага Человечества".

traits.locale_text: "The deed of a true servant of the God-Emperor is to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt and without fear."
"The deed of a true servant of the God-Emperor is to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt and without fear."
"The actions of a true servant of the God-Emperor — to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt or fear."
"The actions of a true servant of the God-Emperor — to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt or fear."
"The actions of a true servant of the God-Emperor — to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt or fear."

languages.text: «Una acción digna de un verdadero sirviente del Dios Emperador: lanzarse contra los enemigos de la Humanidad sin duda ni temor».
languages.original_text: "The actions of a true servant of the God-Emperor — to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt or fear."

traits.locale_text: «Una acción digna de un verdadero sirviente del Dios Emperador: lanzarse contra los enemigos de la Humanidad sin duda ni temor».

languages.text: “这才是神皇真正仆人的作为——扑向人类之敌，毫不犹豫，亦无半分畏惧。”
languages.original_text: "The actions of a true servant of the God-Emperor — to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt or fear."

traits.locale_text: “这才是神皇真正仆人的作为——扑向人类之敌，毫不犹豫，亦无半分畏惧。”

languages.text: « Ce sont bien les actes d'un véritable serviteur de l'Empereur-Dieu : il s'abat sur les ennemis de l'humanité sans peur et sans hésitation ! »
languages.original_text: "The actions of a true servant of the God-Emperor — to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt or fear."

traits.locale_text: « Ce sont bien les actes d'un véritable serviteur de l'Empereur-Dieu : il s'abat sur les ennemis de l'humanité sans peur et sans hésitation ! »

languages.text: "İnsanlığın düşmanının üzerine şüphe veya korku duymadan atılmak... Tanrı İmparator'un gerçek bir hizmetkârının eylemi."
languages.original_text: "The actions of a true servant of the God-Emperor — to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt or fear."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanlığın düşmanının üzerine şüphe veya korku duymadan atılmak... Tanrı İmparator'un gerçek bir hizmetkârının eylemi."

languages.text: "Die Taten eines wahren Dieners des Gottimperators — sich dem Feind der Menschheit ohne Zweifel oder Furcht zu stellen."
languages.original_text: "The actions of a true servant of the God-Emperor — to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt or fear."

traits.locale_text: "Die Taten eines wahren Dieners des Gottimperators — sich dem Feind der Menschheit ohne Zweifel oder Furcht zu stellen."

languages.text: 神皇帝の忠実なるしもべの行動は、疑いも恐れもなしに人類の敵に立ち向かうことである。
languages.original_text: "The actions of a true servant of the God-Emperor — to fall upon the enemy of Humanity without doubt or fear."

traits.locale_text: 神皇帝の忠実なるしもべの行動は、疑いも恐れもなしに人類の敵に立ち向かうことである。
